utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package contains all 7 items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Lisbon), travel_dates (2024-11-10 to 2024-11-14), transportation (flight details with airline, class, cost, and currency), accommodation (hotel with name, price, nights, total cost, and currency), activities (activity name, cost, and currency), additional_services (type, cost, and currency), and total_budget (amount and currency). All are fully detailed according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Lisbon), a transportation option (Budget Airline in economy class), an accommodation (Eco Lodge), an activity (City Walking Tour), and an additional service (Dining Budget). From the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon has a rating of 7, Budget Airline in Economy Class has a rating of 10, Eco Lodge has a rating of 10, and City Walking Tour has a rating of 9. 'Dining Budget' is not explicitly listed in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped to a specific rating.
